languages.text: {n}Иждриг задумчиво чешет бороду, окидывая взглядом поселение.{/n} "Новые вещи, которые нам привозят, помогают. Новые люди, прибывающие на Зарков, помогают реже. На мой век опасностей еще хватит, но нашим детям будет куда легче".

{n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг задумчиво чешет бороду, окидывая взглядом поселение.{/n} "Новые вещи, которые нам привозят, помогают. Новые люди, прибывающие на Зарков, помогают реже. На мой век опасностей еще хватит, но нашим детям будет куда легче".

{n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig fasst sich an seinen Bart und lässt den Blick über den Außenposten schweifen.{/n} "Frische Vorräte sind hilfreich. Neue Leute, die nach Zarkov kommen, weniger. Ich werde zu Lebzeiten noch viele Gefahren sehen, aber unsere Kinder werden es einmal leichter haben."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig fasst sich an seinen Bart und lässt den Blick über den Außenposten schweifen.{/n} "Frische Vorräte sind hilfreich. Neue Leute, die nach Zarkov kommen, weniger. Ich werde zu Lebzeiten noch viele Gefahren sehen, aber unsere Kinder werden es einmal leichter haben."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig se gratte la barbe tout en observant l'avant-poste.{/n} « Les vivres sont les bienvenus. Les nouveaux venus un peu moins. Je verrai bien d'autres menaces au cours de mon existence, mais la vie de nos enfants sera plus douce. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig se gratte la barbe tout en observant l'avant-poste.{/n} « Les vivres sont les bienvenus. Les nouveaux venus un peu moins. Je verrai bien d'autres menaces au cours de mon existence, mais la vie de nos enfants sera plus douce. »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig se rasca la barba mientras recorre el puesto de avanzada con la mirada.{/n} «Nos vendrían bien más suministros, pero no nos conviene que venga gente nueva a Zarkov. En mi vida he afrontado muchos peligros, pero nuestros hijos lo tendrán más fácil».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig se rasca la barba mientras recorre el puesto de avanzada con la mirada.{/n} «Nos vendrían bien más suministros, pero no nos conviene que venga gente nueva a Zarkov. En mi vida he afrontado muchos peligros, pero nuestros hijos lo tendrán más fácil».

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, karakola bakınırken sakalını kaşıyor.{/n} "Taze erzaklar işimizi görüyor. Zarkov'a yeni insanların gelmesi ise iyi olmadı. Hayatım boyunca daha birçok tehlike göreceğim ama çocuklarımızın işi çok daha kolay olacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig, karakola bakınırken sakalını kaşıyor.{/n} "Taze erzaklar işimizi görüyor. Zarkov'a yeni insanların gelmesi ise iyi olmadı. Hayatım boyunca daha birçok tehlike göreceğim ama çocuklarımızın işi çok daha kolay olacak."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格一边环顾着前哨站，一边挠着胡子。{/n}“新鲜补给很有用。至于新来扎尔科夫的人嘛，可就不一定了。我这辈子还会经历许多危险，但我们的后辈日子会好过得多。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格一边环顾着前哨站，一边挠着胡子。{/n}“新鲜补给很有用。至于新来扎尔科夫的人嘛，可就不一定了。我这辈子还会经历许多危险，但我们的后辈日子会好过得多。”

languages.text: {n}イズドリックは髭を掻きながら、砦の周囲を見渡した。{/n}「新鮮な物資はありがたい。ザルコフに新しい人が来るのはそれほどでもない。私は生涯に渡って危険をたくさん経験するだろうが、私たちの子供たちはずっと楽に暮らせるだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig scratches his beard as he looks around the outpost.{/n} "Fresh supplies are helpful. New people coming to Zarkov not so much. I'll see plenty more danger in my lifetime, but our children will have it a lot easier."

traits.locale_text: {n}イズドリックは髭を掻きながら、砦の周囲を見渡した。{/n}「新鮮な物資はありがたい。ザルコフに新しい人が来るのはそれほどでもない。私は生涯に渡って危険をたくさん経験するだろうが、私たちの子供たちはずっと楽に暮らせるだろう。」
